summary: Phase 3 visual BI dashboard - full backend + frontend testing PASSED. Backend: 22/22 pytest passed, 1 skipped (xdist shared-state limitation on _generated_ids list across workers - delete test, NOT a product bug). All 5 tested generation kinds (swot, vc_score, pitch_deck, marketing_plan, brand_strategy) return structured 'data' (dict) + 'raw' (str) + 'label' fields with correct schema-matching shape. /api/workspace/dashboard aggregates scores correctly (business_health, vc_score, marketing, brand, pitch, overall_ai) with auth + 404 + fallback-to-first-project all working. Frontend: /workspace renders DashboardHomePage with Overall AI Score gradient card (7.8/10), 5 score-ring cards with sparkline area charts, Recent AI outputs + Suggested next playbook + ProjectPicker. Sidebar has nav-dashboard + nav-projects. /workspace/projects shows Projects CRUD with seeded Lumen Labs. SWOT renders as full visual dashboard (score ring 7.4, internal/external KPIs, 4 quadrants with scored items + progress bars, RadarChart, AI Recommendations) - NO plain markdown. PitchDeck shows 14-slide thumbnails + slide viewer + Prev/Next + Present + speaker notes + deck score ring. Documents page lists all generations and renders visuals on click. output-copy/output-download/output-delete testids present in GenerationModule (Funding/Strategy/Marketing pages). Recharts SVGs rendering everywhere.

minor.issue: test_delete_one_generation is skipped under pytest-xdist because module-level _generated_ids list isn't shared across workers; the generations are created on gw0 but the delete test runs on gw1. Not a product bug — delete itself works and was verified in iteration_2. If needed, refactor to write the gid into a temp file or use the same loadscope class to fix.

issues: Top-right Copy/Json/Delete buttons on the Documents view do NOT carry the output-copy/output-download/output-delete data-testid (those testids exist on the GenerationModule used in Strategy/Marketing/Funding pages). Functionality works visually; only testid coverage on Documents page is missing if QA wants to drive it via Playwright.

action_items: (OPTIONAL/LOW) Add output-copy/output-download/output-delete data-testid to the Documents page action buttons for parity with GenerationModule, so the same Playwright selectors work across both routes.
(OPTIONAL/LOW) Fix xdist isolation of the generation-delete test by writing the generation_id to a tmp file or co-locating it in the same loadscope class as TestStructuredGeneration.
critical_code_review_comments: workspace.py /generate: _parse_json_response correctly strips ```json fences and falls back to greedy {...} regex; on parse failure returns 502 with clear message — defensive and idempotent retry-safe ✓.

workspace.py /dashboard: clean defensive _score(...) helper with default=None; overall_ai is mean of defined scores only ✓. Returns 404 only on explicit unknown project_id; fallback path returns empty scorecard when user has zero projects ✓.
schemas.py: All 10 kinds documented with concrete JSON example schemas in the system prompt — model is much more likely to comply. Good engineering decision.

GenerationView.jsx: 10-kind REGISTRY dispatcher with explicit Renderer per kind; each renderer guards on optional fields (data?.scores?.overall?.toFixed?.). Will not crash on partial/malformed JSON ✓.

DashboardHomePage.jsx: sparkline data is currently FAKE (Math.sin-based pseudo trend) — acceptable per spec note ('live counts could be added later'), but flag for product follow-up if real trend lines are wanted.
Frontend api.get('/workspace/dashboard', { params: { project_id }}) — correctly skips network call when no current project; uses .finally to clear loading state ✓.
Documents action buttons: missing data-testid; minor accessibility/test surface gap (see action items).

success_rate.backend: 100% (22/22 passed, 1 skipped — xdist isolation, not product)

test_credentials: session_token=test_session_1782634396190, user_id=user_test_1782634396190, seed project_id=proj_mqxihr9g (Lumen Labs). Already-generated history present in db: SWOT, Pitch Deck (x2), VC Score Report (x2), 1-Page Marketing Plan, Brand Strategy.
seed_data_creation: Test run created 5 new generations (swot/vc_score/pitch_deck/marketing_plan/brand_strategy) on the Lumen Labs seed project to validate structured JSON output. These now persist alongside the iteration_2 generations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 production-ready. Backend POST /api/workspace/generate returns {data: dict, raw: str, label: str, generation_id, kind, project_id, user_id, created_at}. JSON parsing has built-in fence-stripping + regex fallback + 502 retry-friendly error. /api/workspace/dashboard returns {project, scores: {business_health, vc_score, marketing, brand, pitch, overall_ai}, counts, latest[]}. Frontend dashboard at /workspace uses data-testid='dashboard-home'; nav uses 'nav-dashboard' + 'nav-projects'; tool buttons are 'tool-{kind}'; action buttons in GenerationModule are output-copy/download/delete. SWOT/VcScore/PitchDeck/MarketingPlan/Brand renderers all live in /app/frontend/src/components/workspace/visuals/GenerationView.jsx. Use 90s+ timeouts for /generate (Gemini 8-30s, occasionally 60s); retry once on 502.
rca of the issue: No production bugs. Two minor testability gaps: (a) Documents page action buttons lack data-testid attributes (functional but harder to Playwright-drive); (b) backend_test.py's delete-after-create test gets isolated by pytest-xdist's loadscope into a different worker than the one that created the gid — easy fix by co-locating in same class or persisting gid to tmp file. Sparkline charts on DashboardHome use synthetic Math.sin data (acceptable per spec, but worth tracking as a follow-up for real time-series trends).
